title: Translating Ethical AI Principles into Public Policy Practices
description: A flowchart depicting the cyclical process of transforming abstract ethical principles into concrete, actionable public policy, incorporating research and stakeholder feedback.
elements: Core Ethical Principles (e.g., Fairness, Accountability, Transparency)
Methods & Research (e.g., Impact Assessments, Audits, Public Consultation)
Policy Outputs (e.g., Regulations, Standards, Incentive Structures)
relationships: Monitoring data and Stakeholder Feedback refine Methods and Principles
